description: A salad centered on crisp romaine lettuce, croutons, Parmesan cheese, and Caesar dressing. The classic dressing is savory and tangy and traditionally includes anchovy, garlic, egg, lemon juice, oil, and Worcestershire sauce.
preparation_steps: Wash and dry the romaine lettuce thoroughly.
Prepare or add the Caesar dressing.
Toss the lettuce with dressing, croutons, and Parmesan.
Top with optional protein such as grilled chicken if desired.

nutrition.calories: Usually moderate; can be high with extra dressing or protein
nutrition.protein: Low to moderate; higher with chicken or egg
nutrition.fat: Moderate to high depending on dressing and cheese

health_advice.benefits: Provides leafy greens and can be made more filling with added protein.
health_advice.risks: The dressing can be high in fat, sodium, and calories, and some versions use raw egg.
health_advice.healthy_tip: Use dressing moderately and add lean protein if you want a more balanced meal.

dietary_notes.note: Classic Caesar dressing is not vegetarian because of anchovy. Gluten-free versions require gluten-free croutons and dressing ingredients checked carefully.

allergens: Fish from anchovy in classic dressing
